pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('.modal-units__table, .unit-group-modal').forEach(function(el, i) { var text = el.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (text.length > 10) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[UNIT TABLE ' + (i+1) + '] ' + text; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; document.body.appendChild(div); } });
